description: Create src/systems/timeSystem.ts with a tick() function that advances game time by 10 minutes per call, handles hour rollover (60 minutes → next hour), and day rollover (2:00 AM → 6:00 AM next day). Store current time as { hours: number, minutes: number, day: number } in Redux via timeSlice.ts. Implement dayStartAt = 6 (6:00 AM) and dayEndAt = 26 (2:00 AM next day) as constants. When tick() pushes time past 2:00 AM, trigger pass-out sequence: fade screen to black, deduct 10% of current money, reset energy to max, and advance to 6:00 AM next day. Acceptance: Calling tick() 6 times advances from 6:00 → 7:00; calling it 144 times (24 hours) advances to next day at 6:00 AM with money reduced by 10% and energy restored.

Implement src/state/slices/timeSlice.ts with initialState containing currentTime (hours=6, minutes=0, day=1), and reducers for updateTime, resetDay, and passOut. Export action creators update_time(), reset_day(), and pass_out(). Integrate with store.ts using createSlice with name: 'time' and proper TypeScript typing for TimeState interface in src/state/types.ts. Acceptance: Redux DevTools show time state updating correctly on tick() and persisting across page refresh via Dexie.

Create src/systems/tileSystem.ts with a TileState type union ('untilled'|'tilled'|'watered'|'planted'|'growing'|'harvestable'|'dead') in src/types/farm.ts. Implement canTransition(from: TileState, to: TileState, tool: ToolType) function that validates transitions (e.g., hoe → untilled→tilled, wateringCan → tilled→watered). Add transition() method that updates tile state and dispatches updateTile action. Acceptance: Attempting to water an 'untilled' tile rejects transition; applying hoe to 'untilled' correctly sets 'tilled'.

Implement src/systems/toolSystem.ts with useTool(toolId: string, tileX: number, tileY: number) that consumes energy (5 per use), checks inventory for required items (e.g., seeds), and triggers tile state transitions via tileSystem.transition(). Hoe tool: untilled → tilled. WateringCan: tilled → watered. Seeds: tilled or watered → planted (consumes 1 seed from inventory). Play tool animation using Phaser Sprite with frame sequence on execution. Acceptance: Using hoe on a tile changes its state and reduces player energy by 5; planting seeds deducts one seed from inventory and sets tile to 'planted'.

Create src/components/TileSelector.ts that renders a highlight sprite over the selected farm tile in FarmScene. Implement getTileAt(x: number, y: number) to convert screen coordinates to grid indices (e.g., 32px tiles). On pointer down event, update ui.selectedTile in Redux via uiSlice.ts and re-render highlight. Deselect on click outside grid or on empty space. Acceptance: Clicking a tile shows green outline; clicking elsewhere removes it; selected tile persists across frames.

Build src/components/ShippingBin.ts with draggable UI panel that displays current items from shippingSlice.state.items[]. On item drop (from inventory), call shippingSystem.addToBin(itemId, count) which removes item from inventory and adds to bin array. Show item icons with quantity counter. Acceptance: Dragging a harvested carrot into bin removes it from inventory and displays in bin preview.

Implement src/systems/shippingSystem.ts with calculateDailyEarnings() that iterates over shipping.items[], looks up baseValue from src/data/items.json, applies quality multiplier (normal=1x, silver=1.25x, gold=1.5x, iridium=2x), sums total, then clears the bin and dispatches addMoney(action.amount). Acceptance: Shipping 2 normal carrots (value=30) and 1 gold carrot (value=45 → 67.5) yields +127.5 money; bin empties after calculation.

Modify src/scenes/FarmScene.ts to register and update tile grid from state, render TileSelector overlay, bind tool use events (left-click), and trigger sleep() when “Sleep” button is clicked. On sleep(), call timeSystem.sleep() which fades screen black, invokes dailyResetSystem.onDayEnd(), waits 1s, then fades in new day with reset energy and incremented day count. Acceptance: Clicking Sleep triggers fade → message “You passed out” at 2:00 AM → wake at 6:00 AM next day with full energy.

Create src/state/slices/inventorySlice.ts with initialState { items: Map<string, number> }, reducers for addItem(), removeItem(), consumeItem(). Integrate with toolSystem to deduct seeds when planting. Ensure inventory state is persisted via Dexie saveService. Acceptance: Planting one seed reduces “Carrot Seed” count by 1; inventory persists across reload.
